steps.title: Isolate the absolute value
steps.content:
Start with $-3|5x+7|+9=-12$. Subtract 9 from both sides to isolate the absolute value term:
$$-3|5x+7|=-21$$
Divide both sides by $-3$:
$$|5x+7|=7$$

steps.title: Split into two cases
steps.content:
An absolute value equation $|A|=7$ means the expression inside equals \$7$ or $-7$. Set up both cases:
  • Case 1: $5x+7=7$
  • Case 2: $5x+7=-7$
